mechanism: Current equity valuations were formed during and priced for the anomalous 1998-2021 negative correlation era. If the anomaly has ended and positive correlation persists, the valuation framework (lower ERP, bonds as hedge) is structurally misapplied, implying 10-25% overvaluation.
regime_dependence: The inconsistency only matters if positive correlation is the new persistent regime. If negative correlation reasserts (as the equity market implicitly prices), current valuations may be appropriate.
